DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT CHRISTINA CARTER, MARK HOGENSON'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANTHONY BERRY TO ANSWER QUESTIONS AT DEPOSITION AND TO PRODUCE FOR INSPECTION DOCUMENTS DESCRIBED IN DEPOSITION NOTICE. GRANTED. THE NEW DEPOSITION DATE WILL BE AFTER JUNE 11. 2018. THE DEPOSITION NOTICE AND ORDER ARE TO BE SERVED PERSONALLY ON THE PLAINTIFF, MR. BERRY. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 DIRECTLY BY EMAIL TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT SKMEDIATE@GMAIL.COM. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Anthony Berry To Answer Questions At Deposition And To Produce For Inspection Documents Described In Deposition Notice
Off Calendar May-31-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alexander MacDougall, Esq. 925-825-9500 of the Law Office of Catherine Walsh for Defendant Christina Carter.
No other Appearance.

Counsel stipulates to the Judge Pro Tem.

DEFENDANT CHRISTINA CARTER, MARK HOGENSON's Motion To Compel Anthony Berry To Answer Questions At Deposition And To Produce For Inspection Documents Described In Deposition Notice.

Granted. The new Deposition date will be after June 11. 2018. The Deposition notice and order are to be served personally on the Plaintiff, Mr. Berry.

Defendant's Counsel to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 directly by email to the Judge Pro Tem at skmediate@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Sanford Kingsley, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
